  "findings": [
    "Rigging hook safety latch is missing or intentionally tied back, rendering the hook unsafe and non-compliant."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the defective hook/rigging assembly from service immediately.",
    "Tag the equipment as out of service.",
    "Replace with a compliant hook featuring a fully functional, self-closing safety latch before commencing any lifting operations."
  ],
  "rationale": "A hook with a missing or disabled safety latch violates safety standards and poses a severe risk of the load or rigging slipping out of the hook bowl during slack or movement. Rigging must not proceed until the hook is replaced or repaired.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.10 (Hooks)",
    "OSHA 1926.251 (Rigging equipment for material handling)"
  ]
}
